subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at Bahá'í Temple Unity in Chicago, 1912-04-30
subcodes.first_line: Among the institutes of the Holy Books is that of the foundation of places of worship... O thou kind Lord! This gathering is turning to Thee.
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @relationship between government and people, @education of children; moral education, @war and peace, @universal peace; world unity, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
